regime_fall.current_status: Day 43 crisis reaches peak intensity with massive U.S. and Israeli military operations decimating Iran's military infrastructure while ceasefire negotiations proceed amid deep regime fracture between hardliners and reformists. Contradictory signals continue as Pentagon declares overwhelming military victory, yet Iran's proxy forces remain active and internal unrest escalates.
regime_fall.last_major_event: U.S. Defense Secretary Hegseth declared 'Operation Epic Fury' a 'capital V military victory' decimating Iran's military capabilities in under 40 days, while Pakistan-brokered ceasefire agreement was reportedly accepted by US, Israel, and Iran's Supreme National Security Council on April 8, 2026.
